description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender black pole with a robust, ornate base that appears to be made of cast iron or steel, painted in a dark green hue. At the top, three distinct lantern-style lamp heads are arranged in a triangular formation, each suspended from elegantly curved arms with decorative scrollwork. The lamp heads themselves have a classic, bell-shaped design, reminiscent of Victorian or Edwardian street lighting. The upper section is adorned with finials and ornamental details, enhancing its historical and decorative appeal. The overall structure is designed for ground installation, providing both illumination and an aesthetic accent to urban streetscapes, parks, or plazas. No signage, banners, or additional attachments are visible on the pole.
description: A tall, ornate lamppost with three classic lantern-style heads, decorative scrollwork, and a robust green base, ideal for historic urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of three lantern heads and the decorative scrollwork at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the lamp heads and the curvature of the supporting arms.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all three lamp heads and ornamental details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the profile of the lamp heads and the ornate base.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic Victorian lantern with bell-shaped glass enclosures and ornate finials
